zh.lifeSummary: 當Hawise Stewart於大約1258年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾登東納爾德時，她的父親Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland45歲，母親Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness50歲。她於1274年之後與Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland在英國薩默塞特卡素 加里結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1317年2月18日在蘇格蘭享年60歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hawise Stewart于大约1258年出生在英国苏格兰艾斯爾登東納爾德时，她的父亲Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland45岁，母亲Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness50岁。她于1274年之后与Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland在英国薩默塞特卡素 加里结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1317年2月18日在苏格兰享年60岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

en.lifeSummary: When Hawise Stewart was born about 1258, in Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland, was 45 and her mother, Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness, was 50. She married Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland after 1274, in Castle Cary, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 18 February 1317, in Scotland, at the age of 60, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hawise Stewart est née environ 1258, à Dundonald, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness, avait 50 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland après 1274, à Castle Cary, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 février 1317, à Écosse, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hawise Stewart um 1258 in Dundonald, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland 45 und ihre Mutter Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness 50. Sie hat nach 1274 in Castle Cary, Somerset, England Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. Februar 1317 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise Stewart è nata il circa 1258 nel Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness, aveva 50 anni. Lei sposato Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland dopo il 1274, nel Castle Cary, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 18 febbraio 1317, nel Scotland, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Hawise Stewartが約1258年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアダンドナルドで生まれた時，父Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotlandは45歳，母Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchionessは50歳であった。1274年以後にイギリスソメルセトカストル カーイでSir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1317年2月18日にスコットランドで60歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hawise Stewart(이)가 대략 1258년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 던도널드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness(은)는 50세였다. 그녀는 1274년 이후 영국 서머세트 카스틀 카리에서 Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1317년 2월 18일 스컷랜드에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise Stewart nasceu aproximadamente 1258, em Dundonald, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness, tinha 50 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland após 1274, em Castle Cary, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 18 de fevereiro de 1317, em Scotland, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hawise Stewart родилась около 1258 г. в местности дундональд, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness, 50. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland после 1274 г. в местности кастл кэри, сомирсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 18 февраля 1317 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hawise Stewart nació aproximadamente 1258, en Dundonald, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness, tenía 50 años. Se casó con Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland después de 1274, en Castle Cary, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 18 de febrero de 1317, en Scotland, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
